results.title: Mavrik Bourque, Predators Sign Six-Year, $33M Contract
results.description: The Nashville Predators signed center Mavrik Bourque to a six-year contract Saturday, just three days after acquiring him from the Dallas Stars. The deal is worth $33 million, carrying a $5.5 million salary cap hit through the 2031-32 campaign. Bourque, 24, made $950,000 last season on a one-year contract with Dallas before hitting restricted free agency. Nashville acquired the negotiating rights to Bourque and defenseman Ilya Lyubushkin by sending a 2027 second-round pick and a 2028 third-rounder, the latter obtained from the Vegas Golden Knights, to Dallas. The Stars were motivated to shed Lyubushkin's $3.25 million cap charge. Bourque posted 20 goals and 21 assists across 82 games last season, his second full NHL campaign, while averaging 15 minutes, 29 seconds of ice time nightly. Dallas general manager Jim Nill, who drafted Bourque 30th overall in 2020, called the departure an unfortunate byproduct of salary cap constraints. "You have to be cap compliant, and those decisions have to be made," said Nill. "He did a good job. His contract was coming up. He bet on himself last year. "Where his contract was going, it was something that we wouldn't be able to fit in. You can't fit everybody in. It's just part of the business." Bourque's cap hit now ties him with Jonathan Marchessault for the third-highest figure among Nashville forwards. The acquisition marks the most significant transaction so far for new Predators general manager Chris MacFarland, who arrived from the Colorado Avalanche to succeed Barry Trotz.

results.title: Manipur Police four militants, recover large cache of arms
results.description: Manipur Police have arrested four insurgent cadres, including a member of the proscribed UNLF (P), in separate operations linked to extortion, while coordinated search operations across Chandel and Thoubal districts led to the seizure of a large cache of arms, grenades and ammunition.

results.title: Manipur Police arrest UNLF (P) cadre, recover large cache of arms
results.description: Manipur Police arrested an extortionist linked to UNLF (P) in Imphal East and recovered weapons in separate searches in Chandel and Thoubal. The seizures included grenades, improvised mortars and more than 1,300 rounds of ammunition as the investigation continued.

results.title: DVLA warns public against fake fine payment messages
results.description: The Driver and Vehicle Licensing Authority (DVLA) has cautioned motorists and the general public against a fraudulent scheme in which scammers send fake text messages requesting recipients to pay supposed DVLA fines through unauthorised online platforms.

results.title: Manipur Police rescue two Assam residents from illegal confinement over debt
results.description: Two residents of Assam who were allegedly held illegally as collateral in connection with an unpaid debt have been rescued from Manipur's Ukhrul district, police said on Sunday, July 5.

results.title: Manipur Police rescue two Assam men, arrest three KCP (PWG) cadres in separate operations
results.description: Manipur Police rescued two Assam men allegedly held over a financial dispute and, in a separate operation, arrested three KCP (PWG) cadres on extortion charges. The operations covered Senapati, Ukhrul, Imphal East and Imphal West, and police said further investigation is underway.
